docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLTSER, ARKADIY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEYSER, ARKADIY $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $49.73 INTEREST, $43.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,192.73, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY GOLTSER, ARKADIY AS TO DEFENDANT SHEYSER, ARKADIY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHEYSER, ARKADIY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHEYSER, ARKADIY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
